results.rendered_html: bahu—kaṇṭaka mfn. ‘many-thorned’, N. of sev. plants (a species of Asteracantha; Alhagi Maurorum; Phoenix Paludosa),  L.

results.rendered_html:
bahukaṇṭaka (bahu + ka˚)
1〉 m. Bez. verschiedener dorniger Pflanzen: eine Varietät von Asteracantha longifolia Nees. (kṣudragokṣura), Hedysarum Alhagi (yavāsa) und Phoenix paludosa Roxb. (hintāla).
— 2〉 f. ā Solanum Jacquini Willd. (agnidamanī)  RĀJAN. _im_ ŚKDR.
